title: did:web DID document endpoint serves zeroed recovery key when not backfilled
description:
In activitypub.rs:830-835, when an account has no recovery_pubkey (None), the DID document endpoint uses a zeroed [0u8; 32] placeholder. This means:

1. The DID document will contain a valid-looking but meaningless Ed25519 public key (all zeros), which is a degenerate point
2. Any client attempting key resolution will get a bogus key without any indication that it's invalid
3. The DID document will be structurally valid but semantically wrong

Should either: (a) omit the Ed25519 verification method entirely when recovery_pubkey is None, or (b) return an error indicating backfill is required.

Affected: src/activitypub.rs:830-835
